title: Preserve title while updating priority
prompt_goal: Design pure behavior to set the priority field of a todo item without modifying its title. Accept an input item with fields title Text and optional priority Text, and an input new_priority Text. Return a new item preserving title and setting priority to new_priority.
public_forbidden: Do not use storage, network, time, randomness, filesystem, or external services.
Do not hardcode verifier cases or special-case concrete input values.
Do not print or emit observable effects.
